text: The stock has demonstrated relative strength ahead of earnings, with a 30-day price return of 4.25% compared to the S&P 500 benchmark return of 3.58% over the same period. This represents an excess return of 0.67% versus the broader market. Second quarter earnings season has been largely positive so far, with more positive surprises than negative ones across the market, setting a favorable backdrop for Amazon's upcoming results release.
